secondary_archetype: Technical PM with customer-facing / solutions engineering flavor

level_signals: 5-7+ years experience in product development of highly technical products
Past experience in Product Management or other similar product development roles at or above the level of Senior Product Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5-7+ years experience in product development of highly technical products.
Past experience in Product Management or other similar product development roles at or above the level of Senior Product Manager.
must_haves.qualifier: at or above Senior PM level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience crafting and tailoring a message for potential customers, including executives.
Ability to communicate highly technical concepts to both non-technical and technically proficient audiences, including recent AI developments.
Degree in a technical or related field, or equivalent professional experience.
Genuine interest in healthcare and improving patient/member experiences

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in healthcare technology, health IT or working with healthcare organizations
Understanding of healthcare compliance requirements (HIPAA, PHI handling and healthcare data privacy)
AI-related experience (experience with product development for AI agents a plus).
Some coding experience with React, Typescript, and Go.
MBA or equivalent professional experience (while this is a product management role, you will have the opportunity to lean into broader business roles).
Past roles that interface with end customers to influence software development.

scope.surface: AI agents for healthcare vertical (health plans, providers, RCM, pharma) — covering benefits, billing, scheduling, intake, and provider search use cases
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS / AI platform — selling to health insurance networks, providers, and healthcare platforms
primary_metrics_inferred: Agent conversation volume (thousands of conversations per day)
Customer acquisition and expansion in healthcare
Cost reduction and revenue impact for healthcare customers
cross_functional_partners: Healthcare customers (health plans, providers, RCMs, pharma companies)
core_responsibilities: Partner directly with engineers and customers to build and ship AI agents handling thousands of customer conversations a day
Discover new use cases and opportunities for AI agents with providers, payers, RCMs, and pharmaceutical companies
Engage with all levels of customers' businesses to discover requirements, present demonstrations, and overcome technical challenges
Develop and improve Sierra virtual agents to fit and anticipate customers' needs and business processes
Become trusted advisors and drive strategic technical strategies for customers
Surface unmet needs, prototype new tools and features, and collaborate with research, product, and platform to shape the future of AI agent development in healthcare

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans subject to the terms of the applicable plans and policies

green_flags: Healthcare vertical already at scale — 'agents already reach over 50% of U.S. families' signals real deployment, not just vision
Prestigious co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong AI ecosystem connections
Clear product surface with concrete example projects listed
Encourages applicants who don't precisely match the job description
Equity participation offered to full-time employees
Comprehensive benefits package including parental leave, fertility benefits, and medical/dental/vision
red_flags: Role blends PM and solutions/pre-sales engineering responsibilities, which may create ambiguous scope or heavy travel expectations
Primarily in-person at San Francisco HQ — eliminates remote candidates
No explicit mention of team size or reporting structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from '5-7+ years' and 'at or above Senior PM' language)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities and example projects; not in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from customer description and platform context)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'primarily an in-person company based in San Francisco')
ambiguities: Years range stated as '5-7+' which is unusual; treated minimum_value as 5 years per schema. The '+' after 7 suggests no hard upper bound.
Role combines deep PM responsibilities with customer-facing advisory/solutions engineering duties — archetype is primarily AI PM but has significant pre-sales/solutions flavor.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not addressed in JD; marked as 'unclear'.
